name: minimax-m25-sapling-integration
description: MiniMax-M2.5 via Anthropic-compatible API (api.minimax.io/anthropic) works with Sapling sdk backend. Auth in ~/.sapling/auth.json under minimax provider. resolveProvider() maps MiniMax* prefix automatically. ~200K context window. Tends to stop early (declares task complete after exploration) — needs explicit must-write-code language in prompts. Gets stuck in retry loops under tight context pressure (re-ran same test 8x at 16K window). At 64K completed 39 turns cleanly, all 690 tests passing.

content: Default to MiniMax-M2.5 model and minimax provider for Sapling runs unless otherwise specified. Set via .env (SAPLING_MODEL=MiniMax-M2.5) or project config.
